creator: ras@e-gerbil.net
text:
On Tue, 10 Jul 2001, Leo Bicknell wrote:

> Also, FWIW, there is a related bug that keeps Richard's suggestion
> from working, it would appear:
> 
> http://www.FreeBSD.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=11966
> 
> So even if his idea is deemed the best solution, something else needs
> to be fixed to get network performance up to par.

Note the date and version of this PR. May 31 1999, FreeBSD 2.2.6.

--
